entry.title: New IDC HQ079617D0001 awarded to JACOBS TECHNOLOGY INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE CONTRACT PROVIDES PRODUCTS AND SERVICES SUPPORTING CONCURRENT TEST, TRAINING, AND OPERATIONS FOR MISSIONS EXECUTED BY OR THROUGH THE MISSILE DEFENSE INTEGRATION AND OPERATIONS CENTER'S MISSION EXECUTION PLATFORM, AND THE EXECUTION OF THE MDA ENTERPRISE COMMUNICATIONS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY ENVIRONMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ADVANCED DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

entry.title: IDC HQ079617D0001 (ARZ994) awarded to JACOBS TECHNOLOGY INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: UNIQUE ENTITY ID OR LEGAL BUSINESS NAME CHANGE - NON-NOVATION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PROTECT MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM BASELINE INTEGRITY WHILE SUPPORTING TECHNICAL EXECUTION OF ALL MISSILE DEFENSE AGENCY EVENTS AND MISSION ACTIVITIES PERFORMED UNDER THE INTEGRATED RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT FOR ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: NATIONAL DEFENSE R&D SERVICES; ATOMIC ENERGY DEFENSE ACTIVITIES; EXPERIMENTAL DEVELOPMENT

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)
